name: word_frequency
lookup_default
mojo_driver:
def main() raises:
    var ages = Dict[String, Int]()
    ages["alice"] = 30
    ages["bob"] = 25
    print(lookup_default(ages, "alice", -1))
    print(lookup_default(ages, "bob", -1))
    print(lookup_default(ages, "carol", -1))

name: sum_by_key
mojo_driver:
def main() raises:
    var keys: List[String] = ["food", "rent", "food", "food", "rent"]
    var vals: List[Int] = [10, 800, 5, 20, 200]
    print(sum_by_key(keys, vals, "food"))
    print(sum_by_key(keys, vals, "rent"))
    print(sum_by_key(keys, vals, "misc"))
